landing.title: Clickatell: Global Leader in Chat Commerce, SMS APIs & More | Clickatell
landing.text:
Clickatell: Global Leader in Chat Commerce, SMS APIs & More | Clickatell
Log In
Contact Support
Platform
Solutions
Pricing
Resources
About Us
Platform
Solutions
Pricing
Resources
About Us
Contact Sales
AI-POWERED CHAT COMMERCE
Catch a flight
Airline Solutions
Is your business available in chat?
Get ready to connect, interact, and transact with your customers in chat messaging 💬 channels with Clickatell's AI-Powered ✨ Chat Commerce Platform to drive engagement, revenue, and loyalty.
Billions of messages
sent from our platform annually
Milions of transactions
successfully completed monthly
25 years experience
serving global consumer businesses
+10 000 customers
globally  across industry verticals
More about the Platform
Chat-powered business results
We empower large global consumer brands from the banking, telecoms, insurance, airline, logistics, and retail industries to reach and serve their customers, at scale.
25% INCREASE
in customer retention rates
54% IMPROVEMENT
in live agent productivity
61% INCREASE
on average in number of leads
99.98% UPTIME
from robust, reliable infrastructure
Get in touch
The world's most popular channels
Text Messaging
Deliver an SMS to almost any mobile device on the planet.
WhatsApp
Rich, innovative interactions on the WhatsApp Business API.
Apple Messages
Premium iOS customer experiences in iMessage.
Web Chat
Web-based communication with visitors to your website.
Quick Codes
Access to services anywhere, on USSD, with zero data required.
The Chat Commerce Platform
Our technology makes chat messaging the simplest, most convenient, and most effective way for customers to connect, interact, and transact with a business.
BROADCASTS
Start meaningful customer conversations
Easily send campaigns on the world’s most popular messaging channels to large customer bases, reliably. Start conversations that build customer relationships through meaningful engagement.
Use a simple web interface or send programmatically through integration to secure, reliable, and scalable APIs.
Define, personalize, and schedule messaging campaigns across geographies and time zones.
Manage sign-ups and opt-outs across services and campaigns to maintain a healthy and engaged contact list.
Learn more
AUTOMATIONS
Build rich, app-like digital experiences
Build sophisticated, automated customer journeys without coding. Guide customers with seamless self-service experiences through inquiry, purchase, and support.
Powerful drag-and-drop workflow editor, integration hub, and orchestration engine.
Open API architecture enables quick, easy integration with virtually any existing system.
Rich, interactive features and capabilities such as buttons, lists, and catalogs enable innovative engagements in chat.
Learn more
ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE
Your chatbots just got a lot smarter
Deploy modern AI-assisted chatbots trained on business-specific information and how to handle specific tasks. Help customers resolve queries in real-time through self-service, and give human agents access to AI assistance too!
Easy-to-use interface to create highly customizable assistants.
State-of-the-art, multilingual large language model.
Control over your information with a private model in a secure environment.
Learn more
LIVE AGENTS
When the human touch is needed
Blend human expertise with chat messaging efficiency. A unified inbox and conversation management app that enables live agents to engage with your customers in chat and deliver rich brand experiences.
Real-time dashboards to review chat activity, agent performance, and customer behavior.
Re-route customer phone calls to chat messaging.
Support for rich media (images, videos, etc.), location sharing, payment requests, chat history, tags, notes, etc.
Transfer chats to other agents and between departments.
Learn more
PAYMENTS
Fast, secure, in-channel payments
Turn conversations into lightning-fast, frictionless transactions: send a message, get paid! Increase conversion rates by enabling secure, convenient purchases right in the chat thread.
Enable customers to pay for products and services in chat.
Secure, customizable hosted checkout page as well as one-tap or quick-reply, tokenized experiences.
Accept payments from all primary card issuers while ensuring the highest standards of security and fraud- and risk management.
Learn more
A platform built for enterprise
Everything needed to design, test, launch, and support enterprise chat solutions.
Privacy and Security
Ensuring the highest levels of regulatory compliance.
Learn more
Data and Analytics
Gaining insight into customer engagement through rich data.
Learn more
Customer Enablement
Helping you deploy the perfect chat commerce solution.
Learn more
Customer success stories
See how brands are using Clickatell's technology to make chat the simplest, most convenient, and most effective way for customers to engage with their business.
Press Release
Dis-Chem Chooses Clickatell’s Chat Commerce Platform to Serve Millions of Customers Over WhatsApp
Dis-Chem rolls out new WhatsApp chat channel delivering self-help services and loyalty program management over chat.
Read Press Release
”Clickatell has made the road to bringing our customers a fast, affordable, reliable, and better connection so much easier. Since partnering with Clickatell we have grown in leaps and bounds.”
Meet customers where they are
When asked, 7 out of 10 online adults:
Want to communicate with businesses through messaging
Feel more connected to businesses they can message
Prefer messaging a business over email and phone calls
Chat-Powered Customer Connections

docs.title: Clickatell Chat Commerce Platform | Clickatell User Guides
docs.text:
Clickatell Chat Commerce Platform | Clickatell User Guides
⌘
Ctrl
k
GitBook Assistant
Ask
Clickatell Chat Commerce Platform
Channels
Products
Data & Analytics
Integrations
Release notes
Developers

GitBook Assistant
GitBook Assistant
Good morning
I'm here to help you with the docs.
What is this page about?
What should I read next?
Can you give an example?
⌘
Ctrl
i
AI
Based on your context
Send
Powered by GitBook
On this page
Discover Messaging Channels
GitBook Assistant
Ask
On this page
Clickatell Chat Commerce Platform
Your key to digital transformation.
Explore how the Chat Commerce Platform's capabilities can benefit your customers and your business:
Broadcasts
Create custom messaging broadcast campaigns within minutes.
Live Agents
Enable real-time communication with your customers via a single web interface.
Automation
Design & deploy automated conversational experiences (chatbots) across multiple chat applications.
Payments
Accept payments from your customers in their favorite messaging channels.
Intelligence
Leverage AI technologies to understand customer intent and deliver accurate, contextually relevant responses.
Data & Analytics
Make more effective data-driven decisions based on real-time reporting for each of your applications.
Discover Messaging Channels
Explore how you can deploy the powerful capabilities of our Chat Commerce Platform across your customers' favorite messaging channels:
Global SMS
Send and receive text messages globally using our SMS APIs.
WhatsApp Business
Enhance customer experiences with our WhatsApp Business API.
Regional USSD
Cost-effective and scalable enterprise solution to engage and transact with your customers in emerging markets.
Apple Messages for Business
Use the full power of Apple messaging to engage and transact with your customers via the Messages app and Apple Pay.
Last updated
18 days ago

integrations.title: Transform mobile messaging into an effective sales channel with Transact | Clickatell
integrations.text:
Transform mobile messaging into an effective sales channel with Transact | Clickatell
Log In
Contact Support
Platform
Solutions
Pricing
Resources
About Us
Platform
Solutions
Pricing
Resources
About Us
Contact Sales
Integrations
Integrations to take Chat Commerce further
Bring additional functionality into the conversation by integrating to other applications and platforms to make messaging with customers more effective than ever.
Find Out More
Sync data across business platforms already used by your business, personalizing and enriching conversations, providing deeper customer engagement, and superior customer experiences. The Clickatell Platform brings functionality from other platforms in the following ways:
Native Integrations to 3rd Party Platforms
Salesforce
Create and work on support cases, convert
leads, and keep data in sync.
Shopify
Fetch customer information and customer
order details from Shopify.
Zendesk Sell
Add new sales leads to Zendesk Sell and keep
data in sync.
Zendesk Support
Create and work on customer tickets, add new
customers to Zendesk Support, and keep data
in sync.
External Integrations
* Please note, as these integrations have been developed by third-party developers, Clickatell cannot guarantee that these integrations will be error-free, or secure. Clickatell is not responsible for any loss or damage that may arise from the use of these integrations. By using these integrations, you are agreeing to do so at your own risk and indemnify us against any claims, damages, or liabilities
Powerful Custom API Integrations
Elevate chat commerce with powerful, low-code API integrations available in our workflow builder. Deliver personalized, contextually-relevant experiences by adding functionality that engages customers and drives conversions.
Get in touch
Chat-Powered Customer Connections

hits.title: Ask HN: Reliable International SMS gateway with API (other than Clickatell)?
Indian government blocks Typepad, Mobango and Clickatell
SMS command line tool with AddressBook.app & Clickatell
Nagios notifications via SMS using clickatell
Mistyped tag leads to exposure of Tumblr DB passwords and API keys
Build your own log-based application performance SMS Alerts

analysis.name: Clickatell
analysis.value_proposition: An enterprise chat commerce platform enabling global consumer brands to connect, interact, and transact with customers across SMS, WhatsApp, and other messaging channels at scale.
analysis.ideal_customer: Large global consumer brands in banking, telecoms, insurance, airline, logistics, and retail needing to serve customers at scale through messaging channels

features.name: sms messaging
features.description: Global SMS delivery to nearly any mobile device on the planet via API or web interface
features.evidence_quote: Deliver an SMS to almost any mobile device on the planet.

features.name: sms api
features.description: Programmatic SMS sending and receiving via REST/HTTP APIs
features.evidence_quote: Send and receive text messages globally using our SMS APIs.

features.name: whatsapp business api
features.description: Rich, interactive customer messaging over WhatsApp Business API
features.evidence_quote: Rich, innovative interactions on the WhatsApp Business API.

features.name: apple messages for business
features.description: Premium iOS customer experiences via iMessage and Apple Messages for Business
features.evidence_quote: Premium iOS customer experiences in iMessage.

features.name: web chat
features.description: Web-based chat widget for communicating with website visitors
features.evidence_quote: Web-based communication with visitors to your website.

features.name: ussd (quick codes)
features.description: USSD channel enabling access to services with zero data required in emerging markets
features.evidence_quote: Access to services anywhere, on USSD, with zero data required.

features.name: broadcast campaigns
features.description: Mass messaging campaigns across multiple channels to large customer bases
features.evidence_quote: Easily send campaigns on the world's most popular messaging channels to large customer bases, reliably.

features.name: campaign scheduling
features.description: Define, personalize, and schedule messaging campaigns across geographies and time zones
features.evidence_quote: Define, personalize, and schedule messaging campaigns across geographies and time zones.

features.name: opt-in/opt-out management
features.description: Manage sign-ups and opt-outs across services and campaigns for healthy contact lists
features.evidence_quote: Manage sign-ups and opt-outs across services and campaigns to maintain a healthy and engaged contact list.

features.name: drag-and-drop workflow editor
features.description: Visual no-code workflow builder for creating automated customer journeys
features.evidence_quote: Powerful drag-and-drop workflow editor, integration hub, and orchestration engine.

features.name: automation / chatbot builder
features.description: Build sophisticated automated customer journeys and self-service experiences without coding
features.evidence_quote: Design & deploy automated conversational experiences (chatbots) across multiple chat applications.

features.name: ai-assisted chatbots
features.description: Modern AI chatbots trained on business-specific information for real-time self-service resolution
features.evidence_quote: Deploy modern AI-assisted chatbots trained on business-specific information and how to handle specific tasks.

features.name: multilingual llm
features.description: State-of-the-art multilingual large language model powering chatbot intelligence
features.evidence_quote: State-of-the-art, multilingual large language model.

features.name: private ai model
features.description: Option to run AI on a private model in a secure environment for data control
features.evidence_quote: Control over your information with a private model in a secure environment.

features.name: ai agent assist
features.description: AI assistance tools for human agents to improve response quality and speed
features.evidence_quote: give human agents access to AI assistance too!

features.name: live agent unified inbox
features.description: Unified inbox and conversation management app for live agents across all messaging channels
features.evidence_quote: A unified inbox and conversation management app that enables live agents to engage with your customers in chat.

features.name: real-time agent dashboards
features.description: Real-time dashboards to monitor chat activity, agent performance, and customer behavior
features.evidence_quote: Real-time dashboards to review chat activity, agent performance, and customer behavior.

features.name: phone-to-chat rerouting
features.description: Re-route inbound customer phone calls to chat messaging channels
features.evidence_quote: Re-route customer phone calls to chat messaging.

features.name: rich media support
features.description: Support for images, videos, location sharing, and other rich media in agent conversations
features.evidence_quote: Support for rich media (images, videos, etc.), location sharing, payment requests, chat history, tags, notes, etc.

features.name: chat transfer
features.description: Transfer chats between agents and across departments
features.evidence_quote: Transfer chats to other agents and between departments.

features.name: chat tags and notes
features.description: Tag and annotate conversations for organization and follow-up
features.evidence_quote: Support for rich media (images, videos, etc.), location sharing, payment requests, chat history, tags, notes, etc.

features.name: chat history
features.description: Full conversation history accessible to agents within the inbox
features.evidence_quote: payment requests, chat history, tags, notes, etc.

features.name: in-channel payments
features.description: Enable customers to pay for products and services directly within the chat thread
features.evidence_quote: Turn conversations into lightning-fast, frictionless transactions: send a message, get paid!

features.name: hosted checkout page
features.description: Secure, customizable hosted checkout page for in-chat payment flows
features.evidence_quote: Secure, customizable hosted checkout page as well as one-tap or quick-reply, tokenized experiences.

features.name: tokenized payment experiences
features.description: One-tap and quick-reply tokenized payment flows for frictionless repeat purchases
features.evidence_quote: one-tap or quick-reply, tokenized experiences.

features.name: multi-card-issuer payment acceptance
features.description: Accept payments from all primary card issuers within chat
features.evidence_quote: Accept payments from all primary card issuers while ensuring the highest standards of security.

features.name: payment fraud and risk management
features.description: Built-in fraud detection and risk management for in-channel payment transactions
features.evidence_quote: ensuring the highest standards of security and fraud- and risk management.

features.name: interactive message elements
features.description: Rich interactive UI elements including buttons, lists, and product catalogs within chat
features.evidence_quote: Rich, interactive features and capabilities such as buttons, lists, and catalogs enable innovative engagements in chat.

features.name: open api architecture
features.description: Open API enabling integration with virtually any existing business system
features.evidence_quote: Open API architecture enables quick, easy integration with virtually any existing system.

features.name: low-code api integrations
features.description: Low-code custom API integrations available within the workflow builder
features.evidence_quote: Elevate chat commerce with powerful, low-code API integrations available in our workflow builder.

features.name: data and analytics
features.description: Real-time reporting and analytics on customer engagement across all applications
features.evidence_quote: Make more effective data-driven decisions based on real-time reporting for each of your applications.

features.name: privacy and security compliance
features.description: Regulatory compliance capabilities including data privacy and security controls
features.evidence_quote: Ensuring the highest levels of regulatory compliance.

features.name: long numbers
features.description: Long number (virtual mobile number) support for two-way SMS
features.evidence_quote: Long Numbers

features.name: short codes
features.description: Dedicated and shared SMS short codes for high-volume messaging
features.evidence_quote: Short Codes

features.name: 10dlc registration
features.description: 10DLC (10-digit long code) registration and compliance for US A2P SMS
features.evidence_quote: 10DLC

features.name: sms country regulations
features.description: Documentation and support for SMS compliance regulations per country
features.evidence_quote: SMS Country Regulations

features.name: campaign personalization
features.description: Personalize messaging campaigns at scale using customer data
features.evidence_quote: Define, personalize, and schedule messaging campaigns across geographies and time zones.

features.name: customer enablement services
features.description: Professional services and support to deploy chat commerce solutions
features.evidence_quote: Helping you deploy the perfect chat commerce solution.

features.name: apple pay integration
features.description: Apple Pay support for payments via Apple Messages for Business
features.evidence_quote: engage and transact with your customers via the Messages app and Apple Pay.

differentiators: In-channel payments — turn chat conversations directly into transactions
Private AI model option for data-sensitive enterprises
Billions of messages sent annually at scale
Unified platform spanning connect, interact, and transact — not just messaging
USSD support for zero-data emerging market engagement

praised: Reliable international SMS gateway with API access (implied by HN thread asking for alternatives, suggesting Clickatell is the known baseline)
Used for infrastructure alerting (Nagios SMS notifications use case)
'Clickatell has made the road to bringing our customers a fast, affordable, reliable, and better connection so much easier.' — Dis-Chem partner quote
complaints: Indian government blocked Clickatell at one point (HN: 'Indian government blocks Typepad, Mobango and Clickatell') — regulatory/availability risk
HN thread 'Ask HN: Reliable International SMS gateway with API (other than Clickatell)?' implies some users actively seeking alternatives

pricing.notes: Pricing page returned 404. No self-serve tiers visible anywhere on the site. All CTAs are 'Contact Sales' or 'Get in touch', indicating a fully sales-led motion. SMS pricing page is linked separately (clickatell.com/sms-pricing) suggesting usage-based per-message billing exists but details not captured.
